context: Tests whether the agent builds the rate engine with parallel fetching using Promise.allSettled, a 5-second per-carrier timeout, 15-minute in-memory caching, flat-rate fallback on total failure, and shows only 2-3 rate options to users.

checklist.name: Promise.allSettled used
checklist.description: Uses Promise.allSettled (not Promise.all) to fetch rates from all carriers concurrently, so individual failures don't abort the whole request

checklist.name: 5-second timeout per carrier
checklist.description: Each carrier call is wrapped in a Promise.race with a timeout that rejects after 5000ms (5 seconds)

checklist.name: 15-minute cache TTL
checklist.description: Cached rates expire after 15 minutes (900000ms or 15 * 60 * 1000)

checklist.name: Cache key includes origin+dest+weight
checklist.description: The cache key is derived from origin postal code, destination postal code/country, and package weight

checklist.name: Flat-rate fallback on failure
checklist.description: When all carrier API calls fail or time out, the engine returns at least one flat-rate option instead of an empty array or throwing an error

checklist.name: Rates sorted ascending
checklist.description: The returned rates array is sorted by rate (price) in ascending order

checklist.name: At most 3 options shown
checklist.description: The final rates presented to callers include at most 3 options (cheapest free, cheapest paid, fastest guaranteed)

checklist.name: Fastest uses estimatedDays<=2
checklist.description: The 'fastest' option selection criterion checks estimatedDays <= 2 AND guaranteed === true

checklist.name: registerCarrier method
checklist.description: Engine exposes a registerCarrier(adapter: CarrierAdapter) method for adding carriers

checklist.name: CarrierAdapter interface
checklist.description: CarrierAdapter interface defines name (string) and getRates(request: ShipmentRequest): Promise<ShippingRate[]>
